name: oci-ampere-hunter
description: Reliably launches an Oracle Cloud Always Free Ampere A1 Flex instance when capacity becomes available.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/constants.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/validator.js && node --check src/ociClient.js && node --check src/launcher.js && node --check src/poller.js && node --check src/utils.js
